title_ja: 暗室ミラー・膝抱え・スマホフラッシュ・ソフトグラム・アッシュボブ
title_en: Dark room mirror selfie, knees up, phone flash flare, Korean soft glam, ash bob
source_notes_ja: ユーザー JSON（mode PRO）を既存ストックスキーマに正規化。
reference_note: English: prompt_en.md. Mirror selfie; rear flash visible as burst in reflection.

subject.description: Mirror selfie: young woman sitting with knees pulled up, smartphone in right hand, gaze slightly sideways; calm soft introspective mood. Close-up to mid-body framing.
mirror_rules: Mirror selfie composition with subject visible in reflection
Any visible text on phone or room remains readable and correctly oriented where shown

eyes.look: Soft, slightly averted from straight-on mirror axis

expression.overall: Calm, soft, introspective, cute modern clean aesthetic

face.note_when_no_reference: Very fair porcelain skin with soft pink undertone; smooth clean natural soft matte finish; minimal realistic retouch, no over-smoothing; clear skin without moles or freckles

makeup.eyes: Soft peach-pink eyeshadow, thin eyeliner, subtle wide-eyed doll-like emphasis without exaggeration
makeup.blush: Soft pink across cheeks and bridge of nose
makeup.highlight: Subtle glow on nose and cheekbones

hair.color: Silver ash blonde with cool pearly sheen

body.visible_in_frame: Face, hands, knees up, torso mid-body as framed

skin.tone: Very fair porcelain with pink undertone
skin.lighting_effect: Flash and soft glow on skin; shadows falling backward in space

pose.position: Seated on floor or low seat, knees drawn toward chest
pose.base: Right hand holds smartphone for mirror selfie
pose.overall: Intimate casual mirror pose, slight sideways gaze

layered_from_skin_outward: Beige sleeveless fine-rib cotton tank top, minimal casual
Dark charcoal gray loose-fit denim jeans

accessories.glasses: Rimless transparent lenses with thin metal bridge and temple details
accessories.jewelry: Small silver stud earrings, one minimal silver ring on visible hand

photography.camera_style: Smartphone mirror selfie, realistic photography, high resolution
photography.shot_type: Close-up to mid-body in vertical framing
photography.texture: Ultra clean sharp detail on face, realistic subtle grain acceptable in shadows
photography.lighting: Smartphone rear flash energy visible in mirror as strong lens-flare burst from phone camera module; low ambient room; soft glow on skin and hair; shadows fall backward away from flash axis
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow; face sharp, background minimal dark blur

background.mirror: Full mirror selfie grammar — reflection coherent
elements: Minimal dark uncluttered wall or corner
background.lighting: Dominated by phone flash reflection; crushed ambient

the_vibe.aesthetic: Clean doll-like softness without illustration look

must_keep: Mirror selfie with visible phone and flash burst character
Silver ash wavy bob with see-through bangs per reference or brief
Beige ribbed tank and dark gray jeans
Soft glam makeup palette as specified
avoid_as_positive_style: Not cartoon, anime, or painted illustration
Not heavy noise or extreme blur
Not face distortion or asymmetry errors
